name: Chocolate Sauerkraut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, and vanilla extract.
3. In another bowl, combine sauerkraut juice, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
4. Add butter or margarine and water to the dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
5. Pour in eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch (23 cm) round cake pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and serving.
